logger.doc:name: Log Cache Clear Request
logger.message: Clearing all cached tokens and user data for fresh start

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "success", "message": "Cache cleared successfully. Fresh start enabled.", "timestamp": now() }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "error", "message": "Failed to clear cache: " ++ (error.description default "Unknown error"), "timestamp": now() }

logger.doc:name: Log Delete Request
logger.message: Received delete account request for user: #[attributes.queryParams.userId default 'unknown']

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "error", "message": "User ID is required", "timestamp": now() }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var updatedTokenCache = (vars.userTokenCache default {}) - vars.userId var updatedDataCache = (vars.userDataCache default {}) - vars.userId var updatedScopesCache = (vars.userScopesCache default {}) - vars.userId --- { "status": "success", "message": "Account data deleted successfully. User will need to reconnect.", "userId": vars.userId, "timestamp": now() }

logger.doc:name: Log Successful Deletion
logger.message: Successfully deleted all data for user: #[vars.userId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "error", "message": "Failed to delete account data: " ++ (error.description default "Unknown error"), "userId": vars.userId, "timestamp": now() }

logger.doc:name: Log Store Token Request
logger.message: Storing token and user data with requested scopes

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "error", "message": "User ID and access token are required", "timestamp": now() }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "success", "message": "Token and user data stored successfully with requested scopes", "userId": vars.userId, "requestedScopes": vars.requestedScopes, "timestamp": now() }

logger.doc:name: Log Successful Storage
logger.message: Successfully stored token and data for user: #[vars.userId] with scopes: #[vars.requestedScopes joinBy ', ']

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "error", "message": "Failed to store token and data: " ++ (error.description default "Unknown error"), "timestamp": now() }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "error", "message": "User ID parameter is required", "timestamp": now() }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var userToken = (vars.userTokenCache default {})[vars.userId] var userData = (vars.userDataCache default {})[vars.userId] var userScopes = (vars.userScopesCache default {})[vars.userId] --- if (userToken != null) { "status": "success", "userId": vars.userId, "tokenInfo": { "hasValidToken": userToken.accessToken != null, "tokenType": userToken.tokenType default "Bearer", "expiresAt": userToken.expiresAt, "storedAt": userToken.storedAt }, "userData": userData, "scopes": userScopes, "timestamp": now() } else { "status": "not_found", "message": "No cached data found for this user. Please connect your bank account.", "userId": vars.userId, "timestamp": now() }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var userToken = (vars.userTokenCache default {})[vars.userId] --- if (userToken != null) 200 else 404

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "error", "message": "Failed to retrieve user data: " ++ (error.description default "Unknown error"), "timestamp": now() }

logger.doc:name: Log List Users Request
logger.message: Retrieving list of all connected users

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "error", "message": "Failed to retrieve connected users: " ++ (error.description default "Unknown error"), "timestamp": now() }
